description: Public command that returns the merged effective configuration. With `-Detailed`, the output includes per-leaf source attribution so the user can see which layer (default / user / policy / project / env / CLI) determined each value, plus whether project config was discovered.
notes: Source attribution adds non-trivial size; ensure it is emitted only with `-Detailed`.
steps: TDD: Plain call returns the effective config object.
TDD: `-Detailed` returns object with `Effective` and `Sources` members.
TDD: `Sources` covers every leaf path in `Effective`.
TDD: `-Detailed` reports `ProjectConfigPath` when found, `$null` when not.
TDD: Output is deterministic for a given input set.
Pester tests using seeded layers in `TestDrive:`.
name: [cfg-09] Get-SlashOpsEffectiveConfig with source attribution
